misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: magazine masthead and publication information, table of contents for the August 1938 issue, and various advertisements for local Utah businesses (University of Utah, Skaggs grocery stores, Deseret Book Company, Daynes Music Co., Mormon Handicraft, furniture stores, bakeries, funeral directors, banks, and Utah Power & Light). No standalone articles, poems, or editorials are present that haven't already been extracted.
